definition: Give a series of items, points, or names. No explanation or elaboration required.

expected_response.format: Enumerated or bulleted series; bare items are acceptable
do: Name the required number of items

question_stem_examples: List four white grape varieties grown in Burgundy.
List three factors that influence wine quality.
mentor_hint: Just name the items. One per line or bullet. No elaboration needed. If asked for 3, give exactly 3 (or more, but not fewer).
